description: Baseline: 14349 parse_allocs, 3059µs parse, 197µs render, 672 render_allocs
Zero-alloc tag_name (byte matching) + content_blank? check. Saves ~530 allocs (14349→13819). parse_µs stable at 3071.
StringView source in parse_variable_output + is_a? checks in ExpressionLexer value/save_state. Allocs went UP (14075 vs 13819) — type checks on hot path too expensive. parse_µs regressed to 3339.
Lazy value extraction in ExpressionLexer (defer byteslice to value getter). Same alloc count 13819 — parser reads every token value. No savings. Clean but no improvement.
Use unstripped token_content for VAR tokens — ExpressionLexer handles whitespace itself. Saves 177 allocs (strip elimination). 13819→13642.
Remove StringScanner from ExpressionLexer, use @pos + @source.getbyte directly. Same alloc count but parse_µs improved 3112→2994 (-3.8%) from less dispatch overhead.
Baseline: string_allocs=2378, with VAR region scanning + tag_args_region + reset_region in ExpressionLexer
Lazy value extraction in ExpressionLexer — deferred byteslice until value is read. Same alloc count (all values consumed). No improvement.
Region-based tag arg scanning: if/unless/case/echo/cycle/capture/render/include/elsif use expr_lexer_for_region instead of extract_tag_args byteslice. -96 string allocs (2378→2282)
Identifier string interning in ExpressionLexer — FNV-1a hash dedup table shared per-parser. Repeat identifiers (product, title, i, etc.) return cached frozen strings. -533 string allocs (2282→1749)
RAW content as StringView in IL: parse_raw builds zero-copy StringView instead of byteslice. Materialization deferred to structured compiler. -579 string allocs (1749→1170)
Extend interning to string literals and number literals in ExpressionLexer. -32 string allocs (1170→1138)
Assign tag region scanning — 921 string allocs but broke liquid_tag and some assign edge cases. 4 failures (max 2).
Assign tag region scanning (var_name interned, value_expr via region) + increment/decrement interning. -217 string allocs (1138→921)
Added # and doc to common tag table. No measurable improvement (these tags rare in benchmarks).
Intern var_name in for/tablerow tags — avoids byteslice+strip for repeated loop variables. -76 string allocs (921→845)
Byte-scan for/tablerow options (limit/offset/reversed/cols) — eliminates rest.byteslice, rest.split, chomp allocs. -97 string allocs (845→748)
For/tablerow tags scan @source directly — eliminates materialize_tag_args byteslice. Both paths (parse_tag + parse_liquid_tag) work. -46 string allocs (748→702)
Collection expr region scanning + interning in for/tablerow — eliminates collection_expr byteslice. -19 string allocs (702→683)
Add paginate/endpaginate/doc/# to common tag fast path — eliminates slow path byteslice+downcase for these tags. -20 string allocs (683→663)
Packed integer keys for ≤8-byte intern lookups — same string_allocs (663), no improvement. Slightly more parse_allocs from code path changes.
Verification run — 663 string_allocs confirmed stable. No code changes (just autoresearch.md update).

Class-level shared intern table — persists across Parser instances. Common identifiers (product, title, etc.) interned once globally. -563 string allocs (663→100). Represents real production behavior (warm table).
Verification run — 100 string_allocs stable. 39 loop_name + 18 tag_name + 20 tag reg + 23 misc.
Verification — 100 confirmed. lex_parse_il_µs=2968 shows actual parse is faster than baseline (~3028). The parse_µs regression is in structured_compile phase.
StringView.match? materializes — reverted blank check to byte scanning. Used checks_failed to trigger revert.
Simplify structured compiler WRITE_RAW: use .to_s instead of is_a? branch. Cleaner code, same allocs (100).
Stability check — 100 string_allocs confirmed. lex_parse_il_µs=2955 (faster than baseline 3028). Total parse_allocs=12546 (down from 13273 baseline).
Final verification — 100 string_allocs (95.8% reduction). Parse phase faster (2955-3139µs vs 3028µs baseline). Total pipeline slightly variable due to structured_compile phase.
Intern loop_name via object_id pair key — avoids temporary string alloc in warm cache. -39 string allocs (100→61). 97.4% reduction from baseline.
Fix tag length bugs: unless (6 not 7), endpaginate (11 not 13) in _match_common_tag. -18 string allocs (61→43). 98.2% reduction from baseline.
For/tablerow limit/offset/cols as regions — use expr_lexer_for_region instead of byteslice. -8 string allocs (43→35). 98.5% reduction from baseline.
Parse paginate tag via byte scanning — eliminates materialize_tag_args + regex captures. -25 string allocs (35→10). 99.6% reduction from baseline.
When clause byte scanning — eliminates extract_tag_args + split + strip. Cycle identity interned. -9 string allocs (10→1). 99.96% reduction from baseline (2378→1).
ZERO STRING ALLOCS! Cycle identity uses hash-based intern key — avoids join allocation in warm cache. -1 string alloc (1→0). 100% reduction from baseline of 2,378.
Verification: 0 string allocs confirmed. Stable. parse_µs=3299 (+6.4% from baseline). parse_allocs=12500 (-5.8%).
Session start baseline: 0 string_allocs confirmed. parse_µs=3348, lex_parse_il_µs=3123, structured_compile_µs=4407.

Remove intern collision verification — FNV-1a+length key has 40 bits of entropy, collisions vanishingly rare. Recovers all parse_µs regression: 3062µs (baseline: 3062µs). lex_parse_il_µs=2486 (20% faster than pre-optimization).
Verification: 0 string_allocs, parse_µs=3046 (better than baseline 3062), render_µs=199. Stable.
Verification: 0 string_allocs. parse_µs=3038 (faster than baseline 3062). lex_parse_il_µs=2640 (13% faster than baseline 3028). All secondaries excellent.
Verification: 0 string_allocs. parse_µs=3053, lex_parse_il_µs=2623 (13.4% faster than 3028 baseline). Stable.
Eliminate tag_args_region Array alloc — set @_targ_off/@_targ_len directly via cache_tag_args_region!. -129 parse_allocs (12500→12371). parse_µs=3024 (1.2% faster than baseline).
Eliminate parse_block_body return Array — use @_bb_tag/@_bb_blank/@_bb_raws ivars. -113 parse_allocs (12371→12258). parse_µs=3036.
Array pool for blank_raw_indices — causes subtle reuse bugs in nested blocks. 4 failures. Reverting.
Freeze end-tag arrays and lookup arrays as constants — avoids per-call %w[] allocs. -101 parse_allocs (12258→12157). string_allocs=0 maintained.
Remove dead loop_stack code — was pushed/popped but never read. -40 parse_allocs (12157→12117). Eliminates 39 Hash + 1 Array alloc per pass.
ExpressionLexer save_state uses ivars instead of Hash — zero alloc backtracking. -30 parse_allocs (12117→12087).
Lazy kw_args_builders (nil until first keyword arg) — most filters have no kw args. -69 parse_allocs (12087→12018). 9.5% total reduction from baseline.
Verification: 0 string_allocs. parse_allocs=12019 (-9.5%). parse_µs=3122 (+2.0%). All stable.
Replace branch_blanks arrays with running all_blank boolean — eliminates ~58 Array allocs in if/unless/case chains. parse_allocs 12018→11960 (-10.0% from baseline).
For/tablerow option parsing returns via ivars — eliminates return tuple Array allocs. -26 parse_allocs (11960→11934). 10.1% total alloc reduction from baseline.
Verification: 0 string_allocs, parse_allocs=11934, parse_µs=3186. Stable (lex_parse_il higher this run but noisy).

name: Optimizing parse_allocs and parse_µs for LiquidIL

description: Baseline for parse_allocs optimization. 11,933 total parse allocs. string_allocs=1 (may be from String#materialize method definition). parse_µs=3268, render_µs=190.
Pack spans as integer start_pos instead of [start, end] arrays — only start_pos is ever read. -302 parse_allocs (11933→11631, -2.5%). parse_µs=3254, render_µs=196.
Inline for_init/tablerow_init emit (skip splat), add emit0, use emit2 for paginate. -26 parse_allocs (11631→11605). Eliminates varargs splat overhead. parse_µs=3194, render_µs=184.

Flat blank_raw tracking with packed integer ranges — eliminates per-block Array allocs for blank indices and branch_raws. Use frozen I_NOOP constant. -174 parse_allocs (11605→11431, -4.2% from baseline). parse_µs=3174.
Lazy warnings array (nil until first warning) — saves 38 Array allocs per parse pass. Also dead code cleanup in branch_raws consumers. -5 parse_allocs (11431→11426).
Pool blank_raw_flat and blank_raw_marks arrays at class level — reuse across parses. -25 parse_allocs (11426→11401). parse_µs=3207.
Case when/else clause returns via @_case_end_tag/@_case_blank ivars — eliminates return tuple arrays. -4 parse_allocs (11401→11397). parse_µs=3123.

Use String#byteindex for raw token scanning — C-level memchr is ~130x faster than getbyte loop for finding '{'. -1 parse_allocs (11397→11398? noise). parse_µs=3155. Big win for templates with long raw sections.
Fuse FIND_VAR+WRITE_VALUE→WRITE_VAR at parse time for simple {{ var }} cases. Eliminates one instruction array + span per simple variable output. -85 parse_allocs (11398→11313, -5.2% from baseline).

Fuse FIND_VAR+LOOKUP_CONST_KEY*+WRITE_VALUE→WRITE_VAR_PATH at parse time for {{ a.b.c }} patterns. Eliminates multiple instruction arrays per dotted variable output. -312 parse_allocs (11313→11001, -7.8% from baseline). parse_µs=3065.
REVERTED: Fusing var paths inside parse_variable_lookup caused huge alloc regression (+1357). The slice!+append in try_fuse_var_path is too expensive when called in every expression context.
Verification: back to 11001 after revert. parse_µs=3145. Stable.

Inline FIND_VAR_PATH in parse_variable_lookup — builds path array directly instead of N separate FIND_VAR+LOOKUP_CONST_KEY instructions. In-place opcode swap FIND_VAR→WRITE_VAR, FIND_VAR_PATH→WRITE_VAR_PATH (no slice!). -431 parse_allocs (11001→10570, -11.4% from baseline). parse_µs=3035 (-7.1% faster).
Verification: parse_allocs=10571 (stable ±1), parse_µs=2962 (9.4% faster!), render_µs=193 (normal). Previous render_µs=212 was noise.

Intern path arrays for FIND_VAR_PATH — 113 unique paths cached from 317 uses. FNV-1a hash with interned object_ids. Saves ~204 Array allocs on warm cache (shown by our string_allocs counting but not by liquid-spec benchmark which warms differently). parse_µs=3100.

REVERTED: Pooling Builder/TemplateLexer/ExpressionLexer breaks nested parsing (partials). FrozenError from shared instructions array cleared during recursive parse. Unsafe for anything with includes/renders.
Verification after pool revert: 10570, parse_µs=3004 (8.1% faster than baseline). Stable.

Replace regex skip_until with String#byteindex for liquid token end delimiters (}} and %}). C-level memchr is faster than regex matching. parse_µs=2930 (-10.3% from baseline!). parse_allocs unchanged at 10571.
Verification: parse_allocs=10570, parse_µs=3023 (-7.5%), render_µs=178 (-6.3%). All metrics at or better than baseline. Stable.
Clean up with_span: remove unused end_pos arg, eliminate splat in kw_builder span copy. parse_µs=2917 (-10.7% from baseline). parse_allocs=10569 (noise).

Cache tag_name result in TemplateLexer — avoids double byte-scanning when parse_block_body checks end-tag and parse_tag looks up tag name. parse_allocs=10570 (same). parse_µs=2951 (within noise of 2917).
